underlying_goal: Set up remote development environment on Ubuntu desktop so they can work on the project without their laptop, including syncing Claude Code conversation logs
friction_detail: Claude initially misunderstood what 'Claude Code platform online' meant, then repeatedly said it couldn't SSH when user was asking for instructions, not asking Claude to do it.
brief_summary: User wanted to set up remote development on their Ubuntu desktop with synced chat logs; got partial answers but Claude repeatedly misunderstood the context and capabilities being discussed.
